name: PAI integration evidence (Article 9 product level)

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 7 (product-level PAI disclosure); Article 9(2)(b) (PAI consideration as constituent of the sustainable investment definition)
Annex III (Article 9 pre-contractual template, PAI section)

summary: Tests whether PAI consideration is operationalised at the product / project level: specific PAI indicators tracked, the threshold or trajectory used to discriminate inclusion, and the evidence that exclusion / engagement triggers actually fire when indicators breach. Goes beyond the entity-level Article 4 policy by requiring product-level integration evidence.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), PAI integration at the product level is expected to be retained as a core test for the highest-tier category. PB Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
